description: Official correspondence, probably. The ends of 6 lines are preserved. Difficult to make out much of the content Mentions "al-Dawla" (likely part of someone's laqab) and maybe al-nāẓir. Needs examination. Reused for a bifolio of Hebrew text on recto.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
